handoff_lessons.lesson: Permissions decisions for third-party agents need formal DEC entries, even when scoped narrow.
'Single-lead operating agent' is a new agent class (Flávia Benson) — distinct from steward / inbox-triage / sweep classes.
'FileTree orchestration is the primary memory model over RAG/vector memory' should be in NORTH_STAR or DECISIONS as a foundational principle (verify capture).
'The repo itself is the memory of the build' — already prominent in CLAUDE.md / GLOBAL_LEDGER; verify wording matches Atlas verbatim capture.

decision_context.context_addition: Original argument: 'ledgers without sub-agents are static memory; sub-agents without ledgers have nowhere to write.'
Operator's framing: 'everything that updates state, memory, or context should eventually be turned into a box.'
Triad emerges from FileTree-orchestration + repo-as-memory axioms.
See D-2 — formal DEC + DEPR entry recommended.
Three-leg architecture: Box-Report Identity / Box-Specific Agents / Reactive Box Network. Verify DEC-005 covers all three legs explicitly.
